name: prism-vscode
description: Delivers ranked, compressed code context to AI agents via Language Model Tools.

prism.grovePath.description: Path to the grove binary (used to auto-start the graph service).

prism.autoIndex.description: Reindex the workspace when files are saved.

languageModelTools.name: prism_query
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Find the most relevant, token-optimized code context for a task. Returns ranked symbols across target/dependency/test categories with progressive disclosure.

task.description: Natural-language description of what the agent is trying to do.

languageModelTools.name: prism_read
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read a file with session-aware compression — full on first read, signature on second, reference on third+.

languageModelTools.name: prism_search
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search symbols by keyword across the codebase.

languageModelTools.name: prism_lookup
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Look up a fully-qualified symbol and return its complete source.

languageModelTools.name: prism_index
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Trigger a delta index of the workspace.

languageModelTools.name: prism_savings
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get the current session's token savings report.

languageModelTools.name: prism_compact
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Compress conversation history by classifying turns and summarizing older ones.

languageModelTools.name: prism_feedback
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Submit a 0–5 rating + notes for a previous prism_query result so ranking can improve.
